sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَيْنَا حِمَايَةُ حِسَابَاتِنَا الشَّخْصِيَّةِ عَلَى الْإِنْتَرْنِتِ.
sentences.translation: Moramo zaštititi naše lične račune na internetu.
sentences.translationEn: We must protect our personal accounts on the internet.

sentences.arabic: اِخْتَارَ خَالِدٌ كَلِمَةَ مُرُورٍ قَوِيَّةً لِحِمَايَةِ بَرِيدِهِ الْإِلِكْتُرُونِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Khalid je izabrao jaku lozinku kako bi zaštitio svoju e-poštu.
sentences.translationEn: Khaled chose a strong password to protect his email.

sentences.arabic: الْأَمْنُ السَّيْبِرَانِيُّ يَحْمِي الْمَعْلُومَاتِ مِنَ السَّرِقَةِ وَالِاخْتِرَاقِ.
sentences.translation: Cyber sigurnost štiti informacije od krađe i hakovanja.
sentences.translationEn: Cybersecurity protects information from theft and hacking.
